memberdef.name: ADDRESS_1_OFFSET
memberdef.initializer: 1 /* MSB byte of address to read or write */

memberdef.name: ADDRESS_2_OFFSET
memberdef.initializer: 2 /* Middle byte of address to read or write */

memberdef.name: ADDRESS_3_OFFSET
memberdef.initializer: 3 /* LSB byte of address to read or write */

memberdef.name: ADDRESS_4_OFFSET
memberdef.initializer: 4 /* LSB byte of address to read or write * when 4 byte address */

memberdef.name: DUMMY_OFFSET
memberdef.initializer: 4 /* Dummy byte offset for fast, dual and quad * reads */

memberdef.name: DUMMY_SIZE
memberdef.initializer: 1 /* Number of dummy bytes for fast, dual and * quad reads */

memberdef.name: DUMMY_CLOCKS
memberdef.initializer: 8 /* Number of dummy bytes for fast, dual and * quad reads */

memberdef.name: RD_ID_SIZE
memberdef.initializer: 4 /* Read ID command + 3 bytes ID response */

memberdef.name: BANK_SEL_SIZE
memberdef.initializer: 2 /* BRWR or EARWR command + 1 byte bank * value */

memberdef.name: RD_CFG_SIZE
memberdef.initializer: 2 /* 1 byte Configuration register + RD CFG * command */

memberdef.name: WR_CFG_SIZE
memberdef.initializer: 3 /* WRR command + 1 byte each Status and * Config Reg */

briefdescription.para: This file contains flash configuration table and flash related defines.

detaileddescription.para: This file should be included in the example files and compiled along with the examples (*.c).

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.12 akm 07/07/20 First release 1.12 akm 07/07/20 Add support for Macronix flash(MX66U2G45G, MX66L2G45G) and ISSI flash(IS25LP01G, IS25WP01G) parts. 1.13 akm 12/10/20 Set Read command as per the qspi bus width. 1.14 akm 07/16/21 Enable Quad Mode for Winbond flashes. 1.15 akm 11/19/21 Fix read/write failures on Spansion flash parts. 1.17 akm 10/31/22 Add support for Winbond flash w25q02nw. 1.18 sb 05/19/23 Update number of sector calculation logic in flash erase API. 1.19 sb 11/10/23 Add support for Winbond flash w25q256jw 1.19 sb 11/10/23 Add support for ISSI flash is25lp02g 1.20 sb 05/20/24 Add support for ISSI flash is25lp01gg 1.20 sb 09/13/24 Updated examples to configure correct baud rate value
